text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Mental & Behavioral Health > Adolescent/Youth Counseling * Hispanic/Latino Community 4 Matching Service Providers Refine Results - Select - No Filter Adoption/Foster Care/Kinship Care Issues Child/Adolescent Sex Offenders Hispanic/Latino Community Immigration Issues Native American Community No Filter Adoption/Foster Care/Kinship Care Issues Child/Adolescent Sex Offenders Hispanic/Latino Community Immigration Issues Native American Community Print & Share All Results X Print & Share Print PDF BALANCE CENTER FOR CHILDREN AND FAMILIES BILINGUAL MENTAL HEALTH SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides bilingual mental health services. Specialties include trauma, prenatal and postpartum depression and anxiety, at-risk adolescents, depression, anxiety, parenting support, acculturation, and immigration issues. 11740 SW Warner Avenue Tigard, OR 97223 Eligibility: Unrestricted, with a focus on Hispanic and Latinx communities Hours: By appointment only Email (503) 596-2222 Get Directions Visit Website More Details LIFESTANCE HEALTH LIFESTANCE HEALTH PORTLAND NE MLK CONEXIONES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers culturally and linguistically specific psychological evaluations and counseling. Evaluations are offered for cognitive functioning, attention problems (ADHD), disabilities, autism, and learning problems or disabilities for individuals from kindergarten age to college/university age. 3500 NE Martin Luther King Jr Boulevard Suite 200 Portland, OR 97212 Eligibility: Hispanic and Latinx identified individuals Hours: Front Desk: Monday-Friday 9am-6:30pm Appointments: Varies (503) 327-8205 Get Directions Visit Website More Details PLAZA DE NUESTRA COMUNIDAD EUGENE MAIN OFFICE MENTAL HEALTH CARE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides bilingual mental health evaluations and services including individual, couples, and family therapy. 195 W 12th Avenue Eugene, OR 97401 Eligibility: Age 6 and older; primarily focus is Latino and immigrant population Hours: Monday-Friday 9am-noon and 1pm-6pm, after hours appointments available by request Email (541) 687-2667 Get Directions Visit Website More Details PLAZA DE NUESTRA COMUNIDAD SPRINGFIELD EDUCATION OFFICE BEHAVIORAL HEALTH & EDUCATION SERVICES MENTAL HEALTH CARE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides bilingual mental health evaluations and services including individual, couples, and family therapy. 1621 Centennial Boulevard Springfield, OR 97477 Eligibility: Age 6 and older; primarily focus is Latino and immigrant population Hours: Monday-Friday 9am-noon and 1pm-6pm, after hours appointments available by request (541) 686-8483 2 Get Directions Visit Website More Details BALANCE CENTER FOR CHILDREN AND FAMILIES BILINGUAL MENTAL HEALTH SERVICES LIFESTANCE HEALTH CONEXIONES PLAZA DE NUESTRA COMUNIDAD MENTAL HEALTH CARE PLAZA DE NUESTRA COMUNIDAD MENTAL HEALTH CARE
